requirementCueLines: 15 credits – Complete three courses from this list:
B BUS 459 – Special Topics in Finance (350)
B BUS 468 – Advanced Accounting and Analytics (363)
5 credits – Complete one course from this list:
BBUS 490 – Special Topics in Business (300, 310), Only counts when approved for concentration; see your advisor before registering.
Before you can register for the capstone courses, you must complete all core courses and meet with your advisor to file a graduation application .
*If you are an Accounting Option student with a Finance Concentration, you cannot use the following courses as part of your Finance Concentration (i.e., no double-counting of courses):
pathwayLabels: Only counts when approved for concentration; see your advisor before registering.
